description: Daisy and Lincoln arrive at James's boobytrapped trailer. Daisy accidentally steps on a landmine but uses her powers to avoid disaster. James antagonizes them but is intrigued when Lincoln offers a Terrigen crystal in exchange for information about the ancient Inhuman. He reveals an ancient Kree artifact and recounts Inhuman legend surrounding 'Alveus.' Lincoln ultimately refuses to give James powers, causing tension between the trio.

transcript.line: If you were me, I know exactly what you'd say right now. “It's time to man up.”
